productDisplayName: Spinn Men Viking White Casual Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Viking shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed shoe with perforations and lace upsPadded tongue and inner (with mesh)Foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with a decoupled heel and multidirectional groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
